## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Navan and GrowthX for content production and marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint ($30k) followed by ongoing growth execution ($15k+/month)](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Services include SEO content production, content refreshes, and various marketing workstreams](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes quality and uses AI-augmented workflows while maintaining human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Navan has concerns about content accuracy, legal approval processes, and potential conflicts with competitors](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Production Process

  - [Uses AI-augmented workflows with human expertise for research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Employs intricate question-answer format research to produce LLM-friendly content](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Content often gets indexed quickly and cited within 24 hours](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Utilizes agentic workflows for comprehensive evaluation and improvement of content](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Focuses on maintaining quality at scale with fact-checking and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Navan's Content Needs and Challenges

  - [Desire to increase B2B SEO content production](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Need for converting webinars into blog posts for maximum impact](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Limited content writer resources for nurture programs](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Potential need for digital advertising artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Concerns about content accuracy and alignment with product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### GrowthX's Engagement Model

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($30,000) followed by growth execution (starting at $15,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Typically produces 35 pieces of content in 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Can handle both content refreshes and new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Flexible in balancing refresh vs. new content based on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Integrates with various CMS platforms, including Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)

### Resource Requirements and Workflow

  - [Initial weeks require 1-3 hours of client time for kickoff and deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Ongoing engagement typically needs about 30 minutes per week from the client](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [GrowthX handles publishing, with options for manual or automated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Can accommodate legal review processes by working in batches](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Pricing and Flexibility

  - [Strategy sprint: $30,000 (one-time fee)](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Growth execution: Starts at $15,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [12-month total commitment (8-week sprint + 10 months execution)](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Pricing can increase based on additional workstreams or volume requirements](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Some flexibility on pricing for budget constraints, assessed case-by-case](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send detailed information on services and "art of the possible" to Nima](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [Explore potential for using Nima's personal email for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Nima to review pricing and service offerings to determine feasibility within budget](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Consider initiating the 8-week strategy sprint to assess fit and value](https://fathom.video/share/XCc6ws63GvxdWDGXhQowsgVw3G86DEx6?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
